sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian gamleh dikna Pasian thu leh deihna.
Thupitak ngaihsun dih ni,
Leitung nate sangin, thudang dang te sangin,
Zong masa zaw le cin, Tua nate tawh hongpia Khawm ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sul honghei vaw sanggam aw,
Sianmang sinthu anbang kumkhawm in ah,
Amaizong dihni, Vanmantam a, ihlungkham nate,
Zeisu zawhna sungah hong tuisuak ding hi,
Van daitui te hongluang ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A thusung kibual leng, Akha sung kibual leng,
A ma thu ah lungkim leng,
Ih lunggulh nate thei, ih tangsap nate nei,
Ih ngaihsut nasangin hongpia nuam zaw amah
muangpeuh leng.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Haksat na hongtun ciang lungkhamna hongtun ciang,
Gilkial dangtak ih thuak ciang,
Pasian mai zong zaw ni, pasian mai en zaw ni,
Midang te muan dingsang,
Zeisu kumpi muan ding hoih zaw hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: lh gitloh na pan in i lungsim niamkhiat in,
Ih Topa kiang zuan dih ni,
Ih lungsim sungkhia in, ih mawhna pulak ni,
Tua hi leh i gamsung, thupha hongpia'n
hong damsak ding hi.
